TRUSTS AND TRUSTEES ACT (NOTARIAL TRUST DEEDS
REGISTRATION, CONSERVATION AND ACCESS)

[ L.S.331.06

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 331.06
REGOLAMEWNTI DWAR TRUSTS AND TRUSTEES
ACT (NOTARIAL TRUST DEEDS REGISTRATION,
CONSERVATION AND ACCESS)
6 ta’ Jannar, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 15 tal-2015.

*Dawn ir regolamenti ġre ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
